title: oncoba paludosa
intro: Oncoba paludosa, also known as the swamp service tree, is a plant species native to tropical Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antimalarial, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Oncoba paludosa include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various skin conditions. The herbal preparations of Oncoba paludosa include a decoction made by boiling the roots or stems in water, which can be taken orally to harness its medicinal properties.
